theme: temple bell-ringing ledger with corrupted lines
title: Temple Bell Ledger: Two Laws Wearing One Mask
strategies: predict 0 for every held-out line (reproduces the checker baseline, Ratio ~ 0.1)

single-recurrence least squares: fit one order-2 linear recurrence a(n)=A*a(n-1)+B*a(n-2)+C over the whole window and roll it forward -- blind to the residue-class switching and dragged off by the corrupted lines, so it drifts on extrapolation

residue-class decomposition + robust recovery: split the equations by n mod m for each candidate modulus m, recover each class's short law by exact-consensus (outlier-immune) solving of equation triples, pick the smallest m that explains all lines, then forward-simulate the clean latent from the clean seed lines to extrapolate exactly
Berlekamp-Massey / long-recurrence fitting: absorbs the switching into a long recurrence that fits the finite window but derails within a few extrapolated steps and is poisoned by the corrupted lines
